name_cn:
Model 26039 Black Small Suede
​【EXPRESS Small Handbag】 M26039 Black M26360 Grey M26905 Ivory White
This Express Small Handbag is a city masterpiece, inspired by the brand's classic Keepall travel bag. Crafted from fine calfskin, it features Monogram classic pattern trim and lining, metal hardware, and the iconic key pouch and padlock, showcasing the essence of Louis Vuitton's travel tradition. The compact size fits daily essentials perfectly, with multiple carrying styles to suit modern urban life.
Dimensions: 17 x 13.5 x 26 cm LPJY60153177
(H x W x L)
